fix: In fanout-run.cjs worker (:359-360) throw on exitCode!==0 || signal==='SIGTERM' so settleItem records rejected and buildPoolSummary.failed is correct; PAIR: make mergeReviewRegistries fail-closed (no PASS from zero readable registries).

Replace spawnSync at fanout-run.cjs:341 with child_process.spawn in a Promise resolving on close (timeout via setTimeout->kill) so await yields and runCappedPool admits concurrency children; target the INNER post-tsx worker only.

Field-name mismatch: review YAML branch_on/skip_when read config.executor.kind (:735/:741/:1009) but the command docs write config.executor.type (start-review-loop.md:141/157/164); both YAMLs declare loader parseExecutorConfig (review:700, research:584) with no shown write-back bind. Make review predicates read the SAME field the docs write, or have resolve_executor.loader write its normalized {kind} back into config.executor before the predicate, and pick ONE canonical field end-to-end. Latent P0 (default native review mis-branches) if no write-back occurs.
In fanout-merge.cjs tryReadJson (:19-29) return a parse-error sentinel instead of null and fail closed on malformed lineage registries (FAIL verdict / non-zero), not skipped_no_registry.
Fold into C-01: spawn detached and on timeout process.kill(-pid,'SIGTERM') then SIGKILL escalate so grandchild model processes die with the lineage (fanout-run.cjs:341-348).
Add .max() to count (executor-config.ts:80) and concurrency (:138) and assert a max total expanded-lineage sum in parseFanoutConfig (:144) before expandLineages materializes them.
Build the child env at fanout-run.cjs:345 from buildExecutorDispatchEnv() allowlist (verify it exists; grep deep-loop-runtime/lib) merged with extraEnv, not full process.env.

In mergeResearchRegistries (:50) and mergeReviewRegistries (:84) dedup by contentHash else normalized file:line+title; merge _lineage sources to an array and keep highest severity instead of dropping.

Add a root-level validator (new exported fn in executor-config.ts) rejecting a raw config with BOTH executor and fanout, called before parseExecutorConfig/parseFanoutConfig; .strip() (:127,:140) silently drops the sibling. Confirmed both layers fail to enforce: schema strips, and the command fan-out default policy (start-review-loop.md:116,:152-155) is prose guidance not a runtime guard.

Zero-pad salvage filename at fanout-salvage.cjs:109 to iteration-${String(iterNum).padStart(3,'0')}.md (or pass the resolved iteration path); update fanout-salvage.vitest.ts which enshrines unpadded names.

In fanout-salvage.cjs stop writing the single recoveredText (:101) into every missing file (:117-119); recover per-iteration text or write one recovery artifact and mark the rest unrecoverable; add post-write validation before counting salvaged (:122).

Either invoke the existing command verbatim per CLI lineage with explicit executor+artifact-dir+session_id+max_iterations (replace buildLoopPrompt fanout-run.cjs:122-146/:315), OR amend spec.md §2 to accept prompt-synthesis and forward max_iterations explicitly.

In fanout-merge.cjs buildAttributionMd (:148-151) compute the row verdict by counting finding.severity==='P0' over registry.findings (matching mergeReviewRegistries:92), not registry.findingsBySeverity.P0.
Leave the top-level self-respawn spawnSync (fanout-run.cjs:52-66) synchronous; add a comment that the C-01 async fix targets the inner post-tsx worker, not this bootstrap wrapper.
Add implementation-summary.md to children 003/004/005/006, regenerate each graph-metadata.json so derived status leaves planned, and refresh parent spec.md continuity (completion_pct:33 -> shipped).
